top_issues.name: Healthcare
top_issues.stance: Medicare-for-all advocate; sponsored universal healthcare legislation and sponsored the Medicare for All Act multiple times.

top_issues.name: Income Inequality
top_issues.stance: Leading voice on wealth gap; consistently advocates for raising minimum wage and expanding social safety net programs.

top_issues.name: Climate Action
top_issues.stance: Co-chairs Senate Climate Caucus; sponsor of Green New Deal framework and aggressive emissions reduction legislation.

top_issues.name: Criminal Justice Reform
top_issues.stance: Advocates for ending mass incarceration; sponsored bills to reduce sentencing disparities and reform policing.

top_issues.name: Consumer Protection
top_issues.stance: Founded Consumer Financial Protection Bureau; author of bankruptcy reform and consumer rights legislation.

top_issues.name: Healthcare
top_issues.stance: Supports Medicare-for-all expansion; authored pricing transparency and prescription drug cost reduction bills.

top_issues.name: Student Debt Relief
top_issues.stance: Advocate for student loan forgiveness and expanded income-driven repayment programs.

top_issues.name: Childcare Access
top_issues.stance: Sponsor of universal childcare proposals; advocates for substantial federal childcare investment.

experience.role: Bankruptcy Law Expert and Legal Scholar

top_issues.name: Constitutional Law
top_issues.stance: Originalist perspective; author of legislation defending First Amendment rights and constitutional limits on federal power.

top_issues.name: Immigration
top_issues.stance: Advocates strict border enforcement and reduced immigration levels; sponsored border security legislation.

top_issues.name: Second Amendment
top_issues.stance: Strong Second Amendment advocate; opposes gun control measures and supports constitutional carry principles.

top_issues.name: Tax Reform
top_issues.stance: Supports flat tax proposals and substantial tax cuts; opposes estate tax and progressive taxation increases.

top_issues.name: Climate Justice
top_issues.stance: Co-sponsor of Green New Deal; advocates bold federal action on emissions reduction and environmental justice.

top_issues.name: Healthcare
top_issues.stance: Medicare-for-all supporter; co-sponsors prescription drug pricing and healthcare access legislation.

top_issues.name: Economic Justice
top_issues.stance: Advocates for federal jobs guarantee, housing as a right, and wealth redistribution measures.

top_issues.name: Immigration
top_issues.stance: Opposes border wall funding; advocates sanctuary city support and pathway to citizenship for undocumented immigrants.

top_issues.name: Student Debt
top_issues.stance: Supports full student debt cancellation and tuition-free public higher education.

top_issues.name: Government Funding
top_issues.stance: Senate Democratic Leader; negotiates federal spending levels and defends social programs in appropriations.

top_issues.name: Democracy Protection
top_issues.stance: Advocate for voting rights expansion; supports campaign finance reform and protections against voter suppression.

top_issues.name: Healthcare
top_issues.stance: Defends Affordable Care Act; advocates for prescription drug negotiation and mental health parity.

top_issues.name: Infrastructure
top_issues.stance: Champion of infrastructure investment; shaped Bipartisan Infrastructure Law and broadband expansion.

top_issues.name: Federal Spending & Government Reform
top_issues.stance: Advocates reducing federal spending and structural government reforms. Has proposed or sponsored making daylight saving time permanent (Sunshine Protection Act), a presidential line-item veto, congressional term limits, and a constitutional supermajority requirement to raise federal taxes.

top_issues.name: Seniors & Aging Policy
top_issues.stance: Chairs the U.S. Senate Special Committee on Aging. States the committee's priorities as accountability, affordability, transparency, and safety for older Americans; sponsored a Senate resolution designating Older Americans Month.

top_issues.name: China & Foreign Policy
top_issues.stance: Sponsored legislation directed at the Chinese government, including the CCP Sanctions Shot Clock Act, the Chinese CBDC Prohibition Act, and the Blocking CCP Spy Tech Act. Also sponsored the DEMOCRACIA Act, which would impose sanctions on the Cuban government.

top_issues.name: Immigration & Border Security
top_issues.stance: States support for stricter border enforcement and has sponsored immigration-enforcement legislation in the Senate.

top_issues.name: Voting Rights
top_issues.stance: Advocates aggressive voting rights protection; supports expansions of early and mail-in voting.

top_issues.name: Criminal Justice Reform
top_issues.stance: Co-leads police accountability efforts; supports sentencing reform and prosecution accountability measures.

top_issues.name: Education
top_issues.stance: Advocates increased funding for underserved schools and programs in Black communities.

top_issues.name: Economic Development
top_issues.stance: Focuses on closing racial wealth gaps through targeted investment and small business support.

top_issues.name: Government Oversight
top_issues.stance: Chairs House Oversight Committee; pursues investigations into executive branch conduct and agency performance.

top_issues.name: Fiscal Responsibility
top_issues.stance: Advocates significant federal spending reductions and constitutional balanced budget requirements.

top_issues.name: Election Integrity
top_issues.stance: Promoted claims about election security concerns; supports voter ID and signature matching requirements.

top_issues.name: Constitutional Authority
top_issues.stance: Emphasizes congressional authority and limitations on executive power.

top_issues.name: Healthcare
top_issues.stance: Defensive advocate for Affordable Care Act; supports Medicare expansion and drug price negotiation.

top_issues.name: Democracy Protection
top_issues.stance: Pro-voting rights; champions legislative protections against gerrymandering and voter suppression.

top_issues.name: Climate Action
top_issues.stance: Co-founder of House Climate Caucus; supports clean energy investments and emissions reduction.

top_issues.name: Social Services
top_issues.stance: Long-time advocate for Social Security and Medicare protection; opposes privatization efforts.

top_issues.name: Fiscal Conservative
top_issues.stance: Advocates dramatic federal spending reductions and opposes government entitlement expansions.

top_issues.name: Government Accountability
top_issues.stance: Leads House Freedom Caucus; pursues aggressive investigations into executive and administrative actions.

top_issues.name: Second Amendment
top_issues.stance: Strong gun rights advocate; opposes gun control measures and supports constitutional carry.

top_issues.name: Trump Administration Support
top_issues.stance: Close ally in House; supportive of Trump policies and critical of potential prosecution.

top_issues.name: Judicial Confirmations
top_issues.stance: Prioritized confirming federal and Supreme Court judges; succeeded in reshaping judiciary with conservative appointees.

top_issues.name: Tax Policy
top_issues.stance: Led passage of 2017 Tax Cuts and Jobs Act; supports lower corporate tax rates and capital gains preferences.

top_issues.name: Government Spending
top_issues.stance: Generally opposes spending increases; advocates for deficit reduction through spending controls.

top_issues.stance: Supports repeal or modification of Affordable Care Act; prefers market-based healthcare solutions.

top_issues.stance: Advocates for tourism industry recovery and small business support in hospitality sector.

top_issues.stance: Focuses on veterans healthcare access and benefits expansion.

top_issues.stance: Supports sustainable fishing and coastal conservation in Florida.

top_issues.stance: Advocates for healthcare affordability and expansion of rural health services.

top_issues.stance: Supports school choice, charter schools, and education savings accounts.

top_issues.stance: Advocate for people with disabilities; supports expanded accessibility and services.

top_issues.stance: Strong defense advocate; supports military funding increases and strategic deterrence.

top_issues.stance: Opposes sanctuary city policies; advocates strict border enforcement and deportation of undocumented immigrants.

top_issues.name: Law and Order
top_issues.stance: Pro-police; supports tough-on-crime legislation and opposes defunding police.

top_issues.stance: Opposes Medicare-for-all; supports private market healthcare and choice.

top_issues.name: Business Deregulation
top_issues.stance: Advocates removal of environmental and labor regulations to ease business operations.

top_issues.name: Defense and Military Strength
top_issues.stance: Defense hawk; advocates increased military spending and aggressive foreign policy stance.

top_issues.stance: Pursues investigations of federal agencies and executive branch conduct.

top_issues.name: Border Security
top_issues.stance: Supports border wall and strict immigration enforcement.

top_issues.stance: Advocates voter ID requirements and election security measures.

top_issues.name: Healthcare Access

top_issues.name: Workers' Rights
top_issues.stance: Pro-union; supports collective bargaining rights and worker protections.

top_issues.stance: Supports universal background checks and red flag laws; advocates for gun safety measures.

top_issues.stance: Advocate for LGBTQ+ protections and equality; supports marriage equality and anti-discrimination legislation.

top_issues.stance: Supports clean energy investment and climate action measures.

top_issues.stance: Strong advocate for gun control measures including universal background checks and assault weapon restrictions.

top_issues.stance: Co-chairs Sustainable Transportation Caucus; supports clean transportation and emissions reduction.

top_issues.stance: Supports healthcare cost containment and prescription drug price negotiation.

top_issues.stance: Advocates progressive taxation and closing tax loopholes for corporations and wealthy individuals.

top_issues.name: District Representation
top_issues.stance: Focus on constituent services and local economic development for South Florida communities.

top_issues.name: Medicare and Social Security
top_issues.stance: Protects entitlements from reduction; advocates for benefit expansions for seniors.

top_issues.stance: Supports small business advocacy and economic development in Florida.

top_issues.stance: Advocates for housing affordability and community development.

top_issues.stance: Advocates comprehensive immigration reform including pathways for documented workers and Dreamers.

top_issues.stance: Focuses on protecting Social Security and Medicare for seniors.

top_issues.name: Climate and Environment
top_issues.stance: Supports environmental protection and clean energy transition.

top_issues.stance: Supports affordable healthcare access and prescription drug price controls.

top_issues.name: Law Enforcement & Public Safety
top_issues.stance: A former Florida Attorney General (2019–2025), Moody emphasizes support for law enforcement and public safety. Has sponsored law-enforcement legislation in the Senate, including a bill to increase penalties for harming animals used in law enforcement; crime and law enforcement is the most frequent policy area of her sponsored bills.

top_issues.name: Education & School Choice
top_issues.stance: Sponsored education legislation in the Senate, including the Home School Graduation Recognition Act, the FLEX Act, and the No Aid for Ghost Students Act.

top_issues.name: Healthcare & Program Integrity
top_issues.stance: Sponsored health legislation focused on program integrity, including the STOP FRAUD in Medicaid Act.

top_issues.name: Immigration & Border Security
top_issues.stance: States securing the border as a priority and has sponsored immigration-related legislation; as Florida Attorney General she joined legal challenges to federal immigration policies.

top_issues.name: National Defense & Military Communities
top_issues.stance: Most of his sponsored legislation addresses armed forces and national security, including the Defense Community Infrastructure Program Revisions Act and the Warrior Road Act.

top_issues.name: Second Amendment
top_issues.stance: Sponsored legislation to repeal the Hughes Amendment to the Firearm Owners' Protection Act.

top_issues.name: Economic & Tax Policy
top_issues.stance: Sponsored tax and savings legislation, including the Save for Success Act.

top_issues.name: Healthcare
top_issues.stance: A physician, Dunn concentrates heavily on health policy; health is by far his most frequent sponsored-legislation area, including the Sickle Cell Disease Comprehensive Care Act, the Mental Health TALK SAFE Act, and the Timely Access to Coverage Decisions Act.

top_issues.name: Foreign Policy & National Security
top_issues.stance: International affairs is among his most frequent areas of sponsored legislation.

top_issues.name: Emergency Management & First Responders
top_issues.stance: Sponsored emergency-management and first-responder legislation, including the First Responder Network Authority Reauthorization Act.

top_issues.name: Education
top_issues.stance: Sponsored education legislation, including the K-12 AI Literacy and Readiness Act and the No Antisemitism in Education Act.

top_issues.name: Foreign Policy
top_issues.stance: International affairs is among his most frequent areas of sponsored legislation.

top_issues.name: Government Operations
top_issues.stance: Government operations and politics is a frequent area of his sponsored legislation.

top_issues.name: Foreign Policy & National Security
top_issues.stance: International affairs and armed-forces/national-security legislation make up most of his sponsored bills.

top_issues.name: Law Enforcement & Federal Protective Services
top_issues.stance: Sponsored law-enforcement funding legislation, including the United States Secret Service Reserve Fund Act and the United States Capitol Police Reserve Fund Act.

top_issues.name: Second Amendment
top_issues.stance: Sponsored legislation to establish nationwide concealed-carry recognition.

top_issues.name: Space & Aerospace
top_issues.stance: Representing Florida's Space Coast, he sponsored the One Giant LEAP Act addressing the space sector.

top_issues.name: Economic Growth & Finance
top_issues.stance: Sponsored economic and financial legislation, including the Greenlighting Growth Act and the LEDGER Act.

top_issues.name: Climate & Environment
top_issues.stance: Sponsored environmental and climate legislation, including the Youth Climate Leadership Act; environmental protection is among his most frequent sponsored-legislation areas.

top_issues.name: Housing
top_issues.stance: Sponsored housing legislation, including the Promoting Resident Ownership of Manufactured Home Communities Act.

top_issues.name: Public Safety & Gun Violence Prevention
top_issues.stance: Crime and law enforcement is among his most frequent sponsored-legislation areas, reflecting a documented focus on gun-violence-prevention policy.
